case_title: METZ ROBERT B VS THE NEW GOVERMENT STORE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $47.89 FILED BY METZ ROBERT B AS TO DEFENDANT THE NEW GOVERMENT STORE VINAS ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO ROBERT VINAS RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF METZ ROBERT B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE NEW GOVERMENT STORE VINAS ROBERT $47.89 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $60.89, AFTER PLTF RECEIVES FULL PYMT THE SHIRT IS TO BE SENT BACK TO THE PLTF'S STORE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
